field.label: Gateway down / up
field.help: Send a notification when a gateway goes fully down and when it recovers.

field.label: Gateway threshold violations (experimental)
field.help: Send a notification when a gateway exceeds its configured dpinger loss or delay thresholds, with current metrics included. Force-down is ignored.

field.label: System reboot / startup
field.help: Send a notification when the system is shutting down and when it has finished booting.

field.label: Configuration changes
field.help: Send a notification whenever the configuration is saved, including the change description and user.

field.label: Unbound DNS up / down
field.help: Send a notification when Unbound DNS stops or recovers. Rapid restarts from reconfiguration are suppressed.

field.label: ISC DHCPv4 up / down
field.help: Send a notification when the ISC DHCPv4 server stops or recovers. Rapid restarts from reconfiguration are suppressed.

field.label: ISC DHCPv6 up / down (experimental)
field.help: Send a notification when the ISC DHCPv6 server stops or recovers. Rapid restarts from reconfiguration are suppressed.

field.label: Firmware / package updates available
field.help: Send a notification when OPNsense detects package updates, and when the system is up to date again after updating. Fires automatically after each of OPNsense's own scheduled firmware checks.

field.label: Fan stopped (experimental)
field.help: Send a notification when any fan reads 0 RPM for longer than the threshold. Fan sensors are auto-discovered from sysctl keys containing "fan" or "rpm".

field.label: Fan stopped threshold (seconds)
field.help: Seconds a fan must read 0 RPM before alerting. Default: 30.

field.label: CPU temperature (experimental)
field.help: Send a notification when any CPU core exceeds the threshold, and when it recovers. Recovery requires dropping 5°C below the threshold to prevent flapping.

field.label: CPU temperature threshold (°C)
field.help: Alert when any core reaches this temperature. Default: 80°C.

field.label: OpenVPN client down / up
field.help: Send a notification when an OpenVPN client has been disconnected longer than the threshold, and when it reconnects.

field.label: OpenVPN disconnect threshold (seconds)
field.help: Seconds a client must be disconnected before alerting. Default: 60. Suppresses brief reconnects during rekeying.

field.label: WireGuard peer down / up
field.help: Send a notification when a WireGuard peer has not completed a handshake within the threshold, and when it reconnects.

field.label: WireGuard handshake threshold (seconds)
field.help: Seconds since last handshake before a peer is considered down. Default: 300 (5 minutes). WireGuard rekeys every ~3 minutes under active traffic.

field.label: APCUPSd Events
field.help: Send notifications for apcupsd events: communications lost/restored, power failure, power restored, battery exhausted. Requires apcupsd to be installed and writing to /var/log/apcupsd.events.
